data.description:
## Summary
The Gerrit `Verified` gate (`.github/workflows/gerrit-verify.yaml`) must run the same CI checks as the post-merge branch CI (`.github/workflows/test.yml`), but the two hand-maintained step lists drifted: three gating checks ran ONLY post-merge, so they could only fail AFTER a change landed on `main`. A stale `docs/env-vars.md` landed exactly this way (green Verified, red main).

## What
Add to gerrit-verify.yaml's build-and-test job:
- Env-var registry drift gate (`scripts/gen_env_registry.py` + git diff on `docs/env-vars.md`)
- server.json env-contract drift gate (`scripts/check_server_manifest.py`)
- pre-commit all-hooks (`pre-commit run --all-files`)
Add `tests/unit/test_ci_workflow_parity.py` to prevent future drift.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The three missing gates run in gerrit-verify.yaml's build-and-test job
- [ ] Parity test fails CI when a gate exists in test.yml but not gerrit-verify.yaml
- [ ] Parity test passes with the additions, fails without them (teeth verified)
- [ ] Both workflow YAMLs parse; make lint clean
data.title: Verified gate (gerrit-verify.yaml) missing 3 gates that branch CI runs — drift lets failures land on main
